🩺 Built by a physician who gets it

Meditation for
healthcare workers

You give everyone else 30 minutes of your time. Give yourself 30 seconds.

Created by Dr. Seth Miller, a practicing GP who built this for himself first — then realized every clinician needs it.

Download on the App Store

The Problem

Burnout isn't a personal failure.
It's a systems problem.

You don't have 20 minutes between patients. You barely have 2. Every meditation app on the market was built for people with yoga mats and open afternoons. You need something that works in the time you actually have.

63%

of physicians report burnout

The highest rate ever recorded. It's not getting better on its own.

46%

of nurses plan to leave

Nearly half of nurses intend to leave their role by 2027. Emotional exhaustion is the #1 reason.

2 min

is what you actually have

Between patients, between rounds, between crises. That's the real window — not the 20 minutes other apps promise.

$4.99

one time, forever

No subscription. No trial countdown. No wellness app charging you $70/year to breathe.

When to Use It

thirty fits where other apps can't.

Real scenarios from real clinical days. No retreats required.

🏥
30 seconds

Between patients

You just delivered bad news. The next patient is waiting. Take 30 seconds to reset before you walk into the next room carrying someone else's grief.

🌙
60 seconds

Mid-shift wind-down

It's 2 AM on a night shift. Your body is exhausted but your mind won't stop replaying the code from earlier. One minute to let it go.

🚗
30 seconds

Before you walk in the door

You've been carrying other people's pain all day. Your family deserves the version of you that showed up — not the one that's still at the hospital.

😔
2 minutes

Compassion fatigue reset

You know you should still care. You do care. You're just tired. A longer session when you need to reconnect with why you started.

📋
30 seconds

Pre-procedure centering

Before the scalpel, before the difficult conversation, before the family meeting. Arrive focused, not frazzled.

🛏️
5 minutes

Post-shift decompression

The shift is over but your nervous system doesn't know it yet. A longer session to help your body catch up to the fact that you're safe now.

Why thirty

Built for your reality, not a wellness fantasy.

⚡

Instant start

Open the app. Breathe. Done. No login screens, no daily affirmation pop-ups, no "how are you feeling today" surveys. You don't have time for that.

🔇

Works silent

Visual breathing guide works without sound. Use it in the break room, the hallway, or between charts without anyone knowing.

🌊

Optional audio

Ocean sounds and white noise when you have earbuds. The breathing animation when you don't. It adapts to your moment.

🌑

Dark by default

Low-light design doesn't flash bright screens in dark call rooms or during night shifts. Your eyes have been through enough today.

📵

Zero data collection

No analytics. No tracking. No HIPAA gray areas. Your meditation habit is nobody's business — not ours, not your employer's.

💰

$4.99. Forever.

One coffee. Lifetime access. We're not going to charge you $70/year for the privilege of breathing. That's not the kind of physicians we are.

🩺 From the developer
"I built thirty because I needed it. Between patients, between meetings, in my car before walking into the house after a long day. Every meditation app wanted 20 minutes I didn't have. I needed 30 seconds that actually worked. So I built it — for myself first, then for everyone like me."

Dr. Seth Miller · General Practitioner · Builder of thirty

Download

You take care of everyone else.
Take 30 seconds for yourself.

No subscription. No guilt. No wellness influencer telling you to journal at 5 AM. Just 30 seconds of calm when you need it most.

Download on the App Store $4.99 one time · No subscription · No tracking
